positive: A majestic, stylized woodland scene at sunrise. A central, elegant silhouette of a curious fox is positioned in the foreground, surrounded by stylized, blooming forest flora like ethereal mushrooms and oversized fern leaves. The composition should be balanced and circular, featuring gentle, sweeping curves. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep forest greens, earthy terracotta, soft gold, and cerulean blue for accent. The style should be a blend of intricate linework and modern, flat illustration, giving a vibrant yet sophisticated aesthetic. The background should show soft gradients of warm sky light filtering through the trees. Print-friendly details require crisp lines, high contrast between foreground and background elements, and a seamless repeating pattern potential. Vector illustration quality.
